feed.description: Investing conversations for normal humans: frameworks, risk, and the habits that matter more than predictions.
feed.title: Long Horizon Notes

# Long Horizon Notes — Episode
## Risk Management for People Who Hate Spreadsheets
Host: Nora
Guest: Kasper
Nora: Welcome back to Long Horizon Notes.
Today we're talking about risk management, and I'm joined by Kasper, personal-finance writer focused on risk.
